category_sources: Official Homebrew formula points to the upstream GitHub project for gptline.
source_facts.description says gptline is a ChatGPT client with native iTerm2 support.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is gptline.
docs_sources: Official upstream GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for usage and project details.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage points to https://github.com/gnachman/gptline, and Homebrew formula also links that upstream GitHub repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies ChatGPT client and native iTerm2 support.
source_facts.executables lists gptline as the command-line executable.
